items.description: Design and development of multiple websites for clients like [Pakapaka](http://www.pakapaka.gob.ar/), [Ruka Kuyen](https://ruka-kuyen.com.ar/), [Comisión Provincial por la Memoria](https://www.comisionporlamemoria.org/) and [Guardalo.com](https://guardalo.com.ar/)
